devdoc.details: - This contract never holds or manages user deposit principal. - Only the one-time authorized SavingCore contract may request interest payouts. - Privileged administration uses OpenZeppelin Ownable2Step. - Bonus C2 reads aggregate interest liabilities from the authorized   SavingCore and protects reserved vault liquidity from owner withdrawal. - The contract is non-upgradeable.

AddressIsNotContract(address).details: The supplied SavingCore address has no deployed bytecode.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

InsufficientVaultBalance(uint256,uint256.details: The vault has insufficient transferable liquidity.

InvalidAddress().details: A required address was the zero address.

InvalidAmount().details: A token amount must be greater than zero.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

SavingCoreAlreadyAuthorized(address).details: SavingCore has already been permanently configured.

UnauthorizedSavingCore(address).details: The caller is not the authorized SavingCore contract.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

authorizeSavingCore(address).details: This operation may succeed only once.

availableLiquidity().details: Uses saturating subtraction when liabilities exceed the balance.

params.token_: ERC20 token used for vault liquidity.

fundVault(uint256).details: Funding remains available while paused so liquidity can be restored.

params.amount: Token amount transferred from the owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

payInterest(address,uint256).details: Only the authorized SavingCore may call this function.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

totalReservedInterest().details: Returns zero before a SavingCore contract is authorized.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

withdrawVault(uint256).details: The withdrawal cannot exceed current available liquidity.

params.amount: Token amount withdrawn to the current owner.

devdoc.title: VaultManager

FeeReceiverUpdated(address,address).notice: Emitted when the early-withdrawal fee receiver changes.

InterestPaid(address,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when SavingCore requests a successful interest payout.

SavingCoreAuthorized(address).notice: Emitted when SavingCore is permanently authorized.

VaultFunded(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when the owner funds the vault.

VaultWithdrawn(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when the current owner withdraws vault liquidity.

availableLiquidity().notice: Returns liquidity that the administrator may withdraw.

feeReceiver().notice: Address that receives early-withdrawal penalties from SavingCore.

fundVault(uint256).notice: Transfers bank-funded interest liquidity into the vault.

fundingShortfall().notice: Returns liabilities not currently covered by vault tokens.

pause().notice: Pauses interest payouts and owner withdrawals.

payInterest(address,uint256).notice: Pays interest from the vault to a specified recipient.

setFeeReceiver(address).notice: Updates the address that receives early-withdrawal penalties.

token().notice: ERC20 token used as the bank-funded interest asset.

totalReservedInterest().notice: Returns aggregate interest liabilities recorded by SavingCore.

unpause().notice: Restores normal interest payouts and owner withdrawals.

vaultBalance().notice: Returns the actual ERC20 balance currently held by the vault.

withdrawVault(uint256).notice: Withdraws unreserved vault liquidity to the current owner.

userdoc.notice: Holds bank-funded ERC20 liquidity used to pay deposit interest.
